lyrics.text: I'm so ready to get gone
lyrics.translation: 我已经准备好要走了

lyrics.text: I'm feeling like a powerful girl
lyrics.translation: 我感觉像个神力女超人

lyrics.text: So come with me, let's go
lyrics.translation: 所以跟我来, 走吧!

lyrics.text: Together we can take on the world
lyrics.translation: 我们可以一起拿下整个世界

lyrics.text: Cause, we're so beyond
lyrics.translation: 因为我们是如此强大

lyrics.text: Living like we're typical girls
lyrics.translation: 就像普通女孩一样相处着

lyrics.text: So take my hand and join me
lyrics.translation: 所以拉着我的手, 跟我一起吧

lyrics.text: Singing hey! hey! hey! okay!
lyrics.translation: 唱吧! 嘿! 嘿! 嘿!

lyrics.text: The world is ours
lyrics.translation: 这世界是我们的

lyrics.text: Moshi moshi
lyrics.translation: 你好 你好

lyrics.text: Hi, hello
lyrics.translation: 嗨, 哈啰!

lyrics.text: Did you call to talk to me?
lyrics.translation: 你可以打电话给我吗?

lyrics.text: Hajime konnichiwa
lyrics.translation: 你好 你好

lyrics.text: I like you and you like me
lyrics.translation: 我喜欢你而且你也喜欢我

lyrics.text: It's time to say hello to a new day
lyrics.translation: 该是时候向新的一天说哈啰

lyrics.text: And have a cup of tea with my very best friend
lyrics.translation: 而且和我的好朋友喝一杯茶

lyrics.text: Whoa, oh, oh, oh
lyrics.translation: 哇, 噢, 噢, 噢

lyrics.text: Are you ready to get lost?
lyrics.translation: 准备好了吗?

lyrics.text: Let's climb up to the highest peaks
lyrics.translation: 来爬上最高的山峰

lyrics.text: And climb higher above the clouds
lyrics.translation: 爬的比那些云还高

lyrics.text: You and I can do anything
lyrics.translation: 你和我能做任何事

lyrics.text: 'Cause, we're so far gone
lyrics.translation: 因为我们在一起这么久了

lyrics.text: Living like the typical girls
lyrics.translation: 就像普通女孩一样相处着

lyrics.text: So take my hand and join me
lyrics.translation: 所以拉着我的手, 跟我一起吧

lyrics.text: Singing hey! hey! hey! okay!
lyrics.translation: 唱吧! 嘿! 嘿! 嘿!

lyrics.translation: 这世界是我们的啊
